title: The Wall and Nausea
excerpt: Being truly conscious means existing in a painful superposition between a social system and the honest, dull silence of the reality.
summary: Being truly conscious means existing in a painful superposition between a social system and the honest, dull silence of the 'In-Itself' and reality.
